title: Mathematical Analysis of Recursive Algorithms: A Step-by-Step Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the systematic process for deriving and solving a recurrence relation to analyze the time complexity of a recursive algorithm.
elements: Solve Recurrence Relation (e.g., Substitution, Recursion Tree, Master Theorem)
relationships: A linear process flow from identifying the algorithm's base case through to solving the recurrence relation to find the final asymptotic time complexity.
